title: KandyToys Light Up Flashing Ankle Skip Ball Kids Skipping Toy
features: Make exercise fun! Build stamina, coordination and general fitness with a fun skipping game!
Easy to use: Just slip one foot through the loop swing your foot to make the ball rotate around your leg on the hoop. Just remember to hop over it with the other foot!
Lights: The ankle skip ball has LED lights that flash when the ball moves.
4 Assorted colours available; one colour is sent out at random.
description: KANDY TOYS ASSORTED LIGHT UP FLASHING ANKLE SKIP BALL SKIPPING
